CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-01-2023 Continued To Jul-26-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Jun-01-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom):

Peter C. Clancy, for and with Seyednavid Mousavirad, Plaintiff.

The court, counsel, and Mr. Mousavirad discuss the conflict of interest caused by the Plaintiff's malpractice lawsuit he filed against Mr. Clancy, which has prompted Mr. Clancy's Motion to Be Relieved as Counsel.

At the conclusion of discussion, the Motion to Be Relieved as Counsel is granted by the court.

Peter C. Clancy is to submit a proposed order on the mandatory Judicial Council Form.

Judge: Richard B, Ulmer Jr., Clerk: R. Woods, Not Reported. (302/RBU)

***After the hearing, an order is signed. (see scanned order for details)***

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar May-18-2023 Continued To Jun-01-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD AS TO PLAINTIFF SEYEDNAVID MOUSAVIRAD.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Matter is continued to June 1, 2023 on the court's own motion. Per Local Rule 2.7(B), Seyednavid Mousavirad Pete Clancy are each instructed to deliver courtesy copies of their opposition and reply papers, respectively, to Department 302 by 3 p.m. on Friday, May 19th.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

Motion And Notice Of Motion To Vacate Dismissal Based On Attorney Error
Off Calendar Apr-11-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF SEYEDNAVID MOUSAVIRAD'S Motion To Vacate Dismissal Based On Attorney Error.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion to vacate dismissal based on attorney error (CCP 473)" is granted.

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)
